source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ 국내 제조인증/3. HAD1717MCW 모델 추가_210723/성적서, 소프트웨어 밸리데이션/(ADD)HAD1717MCW_출하검사성적서.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Final inspection test report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector model ADD, identified as (ADD)HAD1717MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports domestic manufacturing certification records by documenting final inspection, mechanical, electrical safety, performance, software, DICOM, combination, and labeling checks.
keyPoints: Inspection date is shown as 2021.06.11 and test period as 2021-06-11 - 2021-06-11.
Product is described as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Model ADD with Detector S/N HAD1717MCW210611001.
Electrical safety, mechanical information, performance information, combination test, Console Software functions, DICOM transfer/output, and labeling checkpoints are recorded as Pass.
Console Software is listed as MC0-000060 Version 2.1.255.60.

evidence.claim: The document is a final inspection test report for (ADD)HAD1717MCW.
The product is identified as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Model ... ADD

evidence.claim: The detector serial number is HAD1717MCW210611001.
The report form and certificate revisions are listed as AIF801-3-2 REV.05 and 성적서 REV.01.
Electrical safety testing includes protective earth conductor resistance, dielectric strength, leakage current, and power input tests.
evidence.evidenceText: 3. Electrical Safety Test ... Protective Earth Conductor Resistance Test ... Dielectric Strength Test ... Earth Leakage Current Test ... Touch Current Test ... Patient Leakage Current Test ... Power Input Test

evidence.claim: Mechanical inspection recorded outline dimensions and weight as passing.
evidence.evidenceText: 2. Mechanical Information ... Outline Dimension ... Weight ... Pass

evidence.claim: Console Software MC0-000060 Version 2.1.255.60 is listed in the product history.
DICOM transfer and DICOM output requirements are recorded as pass.
evidence.evidenceText: DICOM 적합성 ... DICOM 전송이 되어야 한다. ... DICOM 출력이 되어야 한다. ... Pass

evidence.claim: Combination testing for detector, power supply, and main cable is recorded as pass.
evidence.evidenceText: 5. Combination Test ... Detector & Power Supply & Main Cable ... Pass

evidence.claim: Labeling checks include detector label, box label, sub label, switch box label, and investigation switch label.
evidence.evidenceText: 6. Labeling Check Point ... DETECTOR LABEL & BOX LABEL SUB LABEL SWITCH BOX LABEL 조사스위치 LABEL BOX LABEL

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not explicitly stated in the source text; MFDS/domestic is taken only from source metadata authoritySignal.
Source text appears to be OCR-extracted with table ordering issues and repeated fragments, so some table relationships are partially ambiguous.
No explicit regulatory approval number, certificate number, or MFDS submission identifier is present in the extracted text.
